title: Depth-First Search, Recursion, Paths, and Backtracking
description: DFS marks on return, confuses visitation with solution path, fails to undo dead ends, and promises shortest routes. Learners cumulatively produce traceable DFS solver with path witness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define start, goal, passable-neighbor order, visited policy, result, and failure contract before traversal.
Mark a vertex when discovered so cycles and converging paths cannot schedule repeated work.
Separate explored vertices, active route, rejected branches, and final start-to-goal witness.
